projects.heading: Our Projects
projects.intro: We have completed over 60 schools and institutions across the country, in addition to our sporting infrastructure, residential and commercial projects. Come explore our work!

blog.heading: the K&S Blog
blog.intro: From partners to juniors, we post thoughts and articles from as many perspectives as possible. Explore our blog and see what speaks to you!

getToKnowUs.heading: Get to Know Us
getToKnowUs.body: We are a family-owned business in our third generation, with a legacy of over 55 years. Our core philosophy has always been to create user-friendly and safe environments. While we are based in Bangalore, we have collaborated with institutions nationwide. Click “learn more” to discover our story!
